agents.pr_title: fix(auth): restore null-guard in SessionManager Redis hydration
agents.pr_body:
## Problem
Commit `a3f21b7` removed a null-guard in `SessionManager.__init__` that previously raised `ValueError` when Redis returned `None` for an uncached session. This causes `AttributeError` in all callers that invoke methods on the resulting `None` object.

## Root cause
`auth/session_manager.py` line 87 — removed guard:
```python
# Before (safe)
if raw is None:
    raise ValueError(f'Session not found for user {user_id}')

# After a3f21b7 (broken)
# guard removed — None propagates silently
```

## Fix
Restore the null-guard. Callers are already handling `ValueError` correctly.

## Tests
`test_refresh_token_rotation` and `test_expired_session_cleanup` will pass after this fix.

---
*This PR was opened automatically by ops-pilot. Every tool call is logged to the audit trail.*

*Fix:* Draft PR #1847 opened automatically → <https://github.com/acme-corp/platform/pull/1847|View PR>
